name: Glimepiride And Metformin Hydrochloride Sustained Release Tablets
about: Glimepiride And Metformin Hydrochloride Sustained Release Tablets are a combination medication used to treat type 2 diabetes mellitus. These tablets contain two active ingredients, Glimepiride and Metformin Hydrochloride, which help to control high blood sugar levels. The medication works by increasing the production of insulin and reducing the amount of glucose produced by the liver. The sustained release formula of these tablets ensures a slow and steady release of the medication into the body, providing long-lasting effects. These tablets come in a solid dosage form and are stored in a dry place. The dosage of these tablets should be taken as per the suggestion of a healthcare professional. The medicine is manufactured in India and belongs to the class of general medicines.

faq.q: What is Glimepiride And Metformin Hydrochloride Sustained Release Tablets used for?
faq.a: These tablets are used to treat type 2 diabetes mellitus by controlling high blood sugar levels.

faq.q: What are the active ingredients in these tablets?
faq.a: Glimepiride and Metformin Hydrochloride are the active ingredients in these tablets.

faq.q: How should these tablets be stored?
faq.a: These tablets should be stored in a dry place.

faq.q: What is the dosage of these tablets?
faq.a: The dosage of these tablets should be taken as per the suggestion of a healthcare professional.

faq.q: What is the origin of this medicine?
faq.a: This medicine is manufactured in India.
